bank_snapshot.name: Algebra
bank_snapshot.description: All problems involving algebraic manipulation and equation solving: linear, quadratic, polynomial, rational, exponential, and logarithmic equations and inequalities; systems of equations; functions, t

bank_snapshot.name: Number Theory
bank_snapshot.description: All problems about integers and their properties: divisibility, prime numbers, prime factorization, number of divisors, sum of divisors, GCD, LCM, modular arithmetic, congruences, remainders, Euler's

bank_snapshot.name: Geometry
bank_snapshot.description: All geometric problems: areas and perimeters of triangles, quadrilaterals, circles, and composite figures; volumes and surface areas of prisms, pyramids, cylinders, cones, and spheres; coordinate geom

bank_snapshot.name: Combinatorics
bank_snapshot.description: All counting problems: permutations (ordered arrangements), combinations (unordered selections), the multiplication principle for independent choices, the addition principle for disjoint cases, inclus

bank_snapshot.name: Nested Function Zeros
bank_snapshot.description: Solve for the unknown polynomials and their compositions when dealing with nested polynomial equations and specific zero constraints. This schema addresses scenarios where the compositions lead to con
heuristics: Apply number theory for rationality constraints

bank_snapshot.name: Floor Function Quotient Problems
bank_snapshot.description: Find the value of a variable such that the quotient involving floor function equals a given constant.

bank_snapshot.name: System of Equations with Modulus and Circle
bank_snapshot.description: Solve for all possible real solutions in a system involving modulus and circular equations.

bank_snapshot.name: Tangency and Collinearity in Geometric Configurations
bank_snapshot.description: Problems involving tangency and collinearity conditions among circles and polygon sides within geometric figures.

bank_snapshot.name: Simultaneous Polynomial Root Problems
bank_snapshot.description: Determine relationships between the roots of multiple polynomial equations with constraints or shared roots.

bank_snapshot.name: Relative Primality in Sets
bank_snapshot.description: Find the smallest set of integers constructed under specific rules where no element is relatively prime to the product of the others.

bank_snapshot.name: Complex Parallelogram Properties
bank_snapshot.description: Solve problems involving properties of parallelograms on the complex plane and associated constraints or optimizations.
